title: RC4064 Disability-Related Information - 2025 - Canada.ca
content:
## RC4064 Disability-Related Information - 2025
This guide is for people with impairments in physical or mental function.

## Ways to access the information
- Read the publication Online format rc4064-e.html PDF rc4064-25e.pdf Large print rc4064-lp-25e.pdf

### Read the publication
- Online format rc4064-e.html
- Large print rc4064-lp-25e.pdf
- Download and listen Use your preferred screen reader to listen to the e-text file. E-text (rc4064-25e.txt)
Use your preferred screen reader to listen to the e-text file.
- E-text (rc4064-25e.txt)
- Ask for an alternate format You can order a digital audio, e-text, braille or large print version of this publication to be sent to you by mail. Order alternate formats for persons with disabilities

### Ask for an alternate format
You can order a digital audio, e-text, braille or large print version of this publication to be sent to you by mail.
- Order alternate formats for persons with disabilities

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
